node_0190.description: Train 5 R-Drop models with different seeds, average predictions (teacher), train a single student model on soft labels.
node_0190.rationale: Train 5 R-Drop models with different seeds, average predictions (teacher), train a single student model on soft labels.

node_0191.description: Instead of fixed 0.1 scale for coord PE, make it a learnable parameter.
node_0191.rationale: Instead of fixed 0.1 scale for coord PE, make it a learnable parameter.

node_0192.description: Use small MLP (2->64->D) instead of sinusoidal PE. Learnable spatial encoding that adapts to data.
node_0192.rationale: Use small MLP (2->64->D) instead of sinusoidal PE. Learnable spatial encoding that adapts to data.

node_0193.description: Add different small random perturbation to PE for each R-Drop pass. Spatial-aware diversity beyond just dropout.
node_0193.rationale: Add different small random perturbation to PE for each R-Drop pass. Spatial-aware diversity beyond just dropout.

node_0194.description: Pass 1 with dropout=0.05, pass 2 with dropout=0.2. More diverse views for KL consistency.
node_0194.rationale: Pass 1 with dropout=0.05, pass 2 with dropout=0.2. More diverse views for KL consistency.

node_0195.description: CE + epsilon*(1-pt) term. Alternative to focal loss that may work better with R-Drop.
node_0195.rationale: CE + epsilon*(1-pt) term. Alternative to focal loss that may work better with R-Drop.

node_0196.description: 1536->384->512 MLP projection (was -0.066 without coord PE, may work differently with spatial info).
node_0196.rationale: 1536->384->512 MLP projection (was -0.066 without coord PE, may work differently with spatial info).

node_0197.description: Gradually increase PE scale during training. Let model learn features first, add spatial later.
node_0197.rationale: Gradually increase PE scale during training. Let model learn features first, add spatial later.

node_0198.description: Add skip connection around the attention-weighted aggregation. M = M + h_mean where h_mean is unweighted average.
node_0198.rationale: Add skip connection around the attention-weighted aggregation. M = M + h_mean where h_mean is unweighted average.
